name: quality-report
tagline: Generate quality daily, weekly, and monthly reports — Excel and PPT output, mock data when needed
description: Creates quality reports for a chosen period: daily, weekly, or monthly. Weekly and monthly can be Simple (one-page summary) or Complex (full metrics, charts, detailed issues). Outputs both Excel and PPT (or content for both). If the user has no data, generates realistic mock data. Use for 品质日报/周报/月报, quality KPI reports, and management reporting.
author: OpenClaw Skills
